epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Dix-Hallpike with characteristic nystagmus; rule out central causes with neurologic red flags

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often diagnosed clinically in APS/ER; limited vestibular specialty access
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Epley maneuver, vestibular rehab; avoid prolonged vestibular suppressants; evaluate for central causes when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Underuse of repositioning maneuvers and overuse of vestibular suppressants
